items.name: MahirK7-FinalYearProject_F1NN-MonteCarlo_P2725883
items.description: Final Year Project - An Integrated Data Engineering & Machine Learning Framework  for Formula 1 Race Strategy Simulation. Uses Neural Networks for Lap-time prediction, best model is then integrated within a Monte Carlo Simulation to generate F1 Race Strategies. Strategies the benchmarked against real 2025 races for comaparison

items.description: ⚽ Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.

items.description: An AI-augmented analytical framework and machine learning solution designed to diagnose operational inefficiencies, isolate multi-million dollar logistics bottlenecks, and proactively predict shipment delays using the enterprise-grade DataCo Global supply chain dataset.

items.name: automated-hypothesis-generation-drug-discovery
items.description: An AI-driven framework for automated hypothesis generation in early-stage drug discovery using machine learning, statistical inference, and ChEMBL bioactivity data. This repository contains data preprocessing pipelines, feature engineering scripts, predictive modeling workflows, hypothesis generation modules, and reproducibility resources.

items.name: Machine_Learning-INCART_ArrhythmiaDataset
items.description: Machine Learning framework for INCART Arrhythmia ECG classification using SMOTE, RandomizedSearchCV, Stratified K-Fold CV, Explainable AI (SHAP & LIME), and statistical validation (Wilcoxon & Friedman tests).

items.description: A Hybrid Feature Selection Framework for Biomarker Identification in Cholangiocarcinoma Using Gene Expression Data and Machine Learning

items.description: [~]  IntegratedPipeline is a standalone AI Agent Library for Non-LLM memory Augmented Agentic Framework, Specifically designed to provide Agentic capability for any Autonomous Agentic Framework locally and Coordinatively that runs efficiently on Consumer based machine to High end embedded systems, While continuously learning and runs efficiently.

items.name: cloud-failure-prediction-xai

items.name: TED-Protein-Domain-Search-Framework
items.description: A TED-based workflow for proteomics domain search and automated statistics. Accept proteomics data input and returns domain resolution results in a Microsoft Excel XLSX file. The workflow also includes modules for statistical and machine learning clustering and differential analysis of proteomics domain data from different species.

items.name: Zeofy
items.description: ZeoFy a machine learning-driven synthesis optimization platform designed to assist researchers in predicting zeolite frameworks using synthesis parameters. ZeoFy currently supports the prediction of 5 zeolite frameworks using 733 synthesis datasets trained into the machine learning model.

items.name: warp
items.description: A Python framework for GPU-accelerated simulation, robotics, and machine learning.

items.name: smart-crop-yield-prediction-analytics

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: ML-framework-for-SWF-retrieval
items.description: Machine learning framework for estimating global Surface Water Fraction (SWF) from passive microwave brightness temperatures (WindSat/CIMR). Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.

items.name: Transformer-vs-Traditional-NLP-Benchmarking
items.description: Developed a comparative NLP framework evaluating traditional machine learning models against transformer-based BERT architectures for text classification, achieving improved accuracy and contextual understanding through fine-tuning and advanced NLP pipelines.

items.name: Crime-Pattern-Analysis-Using-Data-Visualisation-And-Machine-Learning
items.description: This project is an AI/ML-based data visualization framework developed for crime pattern analysis. The system analyzes crime-related data and presents it in a simple, interactive, and visually understandable format using various visualization techniques such as histograms, bar charts, pie charts, and heat maps.

Features modular exploratory data analysis, rigorous statistical A/B testing on South African policyholder profiles, and machine learning risk frameworks to optimize underwriting performance and identify low-risk marketing targets.

items.description: This study aims to develop a reliable machine learning model to predict daily stock market price movement directions. Due to the complex nature of financial markets, a blending ensemble framework is implemented, combining multiple models to improve prediction accuracy, stability, and robustness.

Compares statistical inference frameworks against Machine Learning.

items.description: A two-stage machine learning framework for loan default classification and loss severity prediction using Logistic Regression, Elastic Net, Ridge, PLS, Random Forest, and XGBoost.

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: YOLO-Based-Real-Time-Identity-Verification-and-Financial-Fraud-Detection-System
items.description: A unified compliance framework combining YOLOv8 person detection, Tesseract OCR, and DeepFace biometric verification for automated Video KYC, integrated with an Isolation Forest machine learning model for real-time financial anomaly detection. Built with a FastAPI backend and secure SQLite architecture.

items.name: PhosFate
items.description: PhosBind is a machine learning framework that leverages ESM2 protein embeddings to predict and classify anion-binding sites, with a focus on phosphate recognition. It enables data-driven insights into protein–anion interactions for applications in biomolecular design and nutrient recovery.

By pairing advanced prescriptive analytics with predictive machine learning model, It minimizes total fleet costs, maximizes container volume utilization, and automates real-time dispatch scheduling.

This ontology provides researchers, developers, and practitioners with a unified, machine-readable framework to guide the design and assessment of fair ML systems.

By integrating machine learning with real-time geographical and meteorological data, this project aims to provide early-warning systems to save lives and infrastructure in high-risk zones.
